blocks.content: Kit pulled back from the window and flattened himself against the wall beside it. The man filled the doorway — big, loose, leaning against the frame.
One second. Neither of them moved.
Kit grabbed the picture frame from the shelf and threw it hard at the far wall.
It hit with a crack. The man's head swung toward the sound.
Out the door, past the man — close enough to smell him — into the hallway, the man already shouting. Outer edge of the stairs. Third step. Eighth—
He didn't skip the eighth. His foot went through. The rotten wood gave, he pitched sideways, grabbed the banister, the banister pulled clean from the wall, and he went down two steps on his side.
The man from the bedroom at the top of the stairs. The second one in the hallway below. His ankle caught. Both exits covered.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: This is the part where I needed a better plan.
